introSection: Dive to Atlantis was a steel water roller coaster located at Mt. Olympus Water & Theme Park in Wisconsin Dells, Wisconsin, USA. It was removed in 2008 without prior announcement.
fullText: Dive to Atlantis was a steel water roller coaster located at Mt. Olympus Water & Theme Park in Wisconsin Dells, Wisconsin, USA. It was removed in 2008 without prior announcement.
